notes: i honestly know almost nothing about various tweaks and i dont know if its fixable, but since Paradox Interactive bought out the company and made it so you have to run it through their ad platform (that i dont think supports linux) so the game is unplayable for me due to this... if anyone knows a fix please let me know!
title: Prison Architect

notes: Doesn't work anymore after Paradox added their launcher, such a shame. This game used to run perfectly.
title: Prison Architect

notes:
To skip the launcher change the start options to this:   


"/PATH_TO_PRISON_ARCHITECT/PrisonArchitect" %command%
title: Prison Architect

notes:
This game stopped working after Paradox added the launcher.

The launcher should be bypassed to start game.

"path_to_prison_architect/PrisonArchitect.x86_64" %command%
